title: rosa canina f. medioxima
intro: Rosa canina f. medioxima, also known as the dwarf or compact dog rose, is a variety of the dog rose plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina f. medioxima include its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and provide relief from symptoms of menopause and PMS. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina f. medioxima include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
